summary: Backend testing complete for Sanctuaire Sacré. All 22 pytest tests passed (100%). Verified: health check, categories (3), prayers (12 seeded with 6 premium correctly masked for anonymous/non-donor, unlocked for donor), full JWT auth flow (register, login, /me, duplicate detection, invalid password), prayer-requests CRUD (anonymous + authenticated /mine), AI prayer generation (auth required, donor-only enforcement returns 403 for non-donor, Claude Sonnet 4.5 generates a French prayer for donor, /ai/my-prayers list), donations (4 packages with correct amounts 7/21/49/108, Stripe checkout session URL creation, status retrieval, invalid package rejection), testimonies list.
critical_code_review_comments: RESEND_API_KEY is a placeholder (re_placeholder_key) so welcome/thank-you emails are mocked (logged only). Expected per request, but must be replaced for production.

STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent is a test key — Stripe checkout URLs are generated via emergentintegrations; payment status remains 'unpaid/open' until a real session is paid. This is correct for dev.
JWT_SECRET in .env is a default value; should be rotated for production.
server.py startup auto-seed works; idempotent seed endpoint (/api/admin/seed) is publicly accessible — consider adding an admin guard before production.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded from all responses via projection {'_id': 0}.
seed_data_creation: Prayers auto-seeded on startup (12 prayers, 6 premium across soins/protection/exorcisme). New test users created with random emails test_<uuid>@example.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints fully working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable as regression suite. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. AI prayer generation takes ~5-10s. Stripe checkout returns real session URLs; full paid-status flow requires actual Stripe payment. For frontend testing, focus on integration with these verified endpoints.
